title: Change the data that is displayed when multiple items are linked in a connect board column.
excerpt: When you link multiple items through a connect boards column: E.g., The row is a project and the connect board column links to the 4 FTEs that are allocated to that project. Mirror cols do not work properly for displayin…

posts.author: VincentIBM (Vincent Chenneveau)
posts.cookedHtml:
When you link multiple items through a connect boards column: E.g., The row is a project and the connect board column links to the 4 FTEs that are allocated to that project. Mirror cols do not work properly for displaying data about the 4 linked FTE’s.

The data that is displayed in the connect board column is the “Name” of the item. The feature request is to be able to change the data that is presented i.e., because we use unique identifiers for our resource management only the identifier shows up when they are connected anywhere. Being allowed to select another text field as “to be displayed” would be very helpful!
